title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — EMEA — Q2 FY2026 (May – July 2026)
summary: EMEA executes the most comprehensive crypto regulatory infrastructure activation in history. Thirty-nine EU events center on MiCA's July 1 implementation, with over 30 technical standards published through December and AMLA launching direct supervision of high-risk CASPs in Q3. The UK opens its crypto authorisation gateway in September while finalising stablecoin prudential requirements for January 2027. Sixteen Middle Eastern jurisdictions advance licensing frameworks, with UAE's September fint
